name: ccc-seo-suite
description: CCC SEO AI Suite - full-stack AI-native SEO operation for non-technical teams. Two-layer architecture: 17 atomic skills (engineering substrate) + 7 user-task orchestrators + entry router + client-facing handoff layer + 2 artifact/audit skills. Closed GSC learning loop with cohort attribution + per-platform AI citation tracking + multi-content-type / multi-language first-class. Includes engagement-start rescue mode for clients arriving with substantial existing content. Shared _lib (docx-helpers, dataforseo-client with cost-logging, voice-loader) + schemas + folder templates. Built on the BenAI marketplace SEO stack with significant CCC extensions for compounding quality.
